frame,0x0770:u8,0x0778:u8,0x077c:u8,0x0780:u8,0x078c:u32,0x0790:u32,0x07d2:u8,0x07e0:u8,0x07e5:u8,0x07e8:u16,0x07ea:u16,0x07f0:u8,0x07f8:u32,0x07fc:u8,0x07fd:u8,0x07fe:u8,0x07ff:u8,0x0800:u8,0x0801:u8,0x0802:u8,0x0803:u8,0x080c:u8,0x080d:u8,0x080e:u8,0x0824:u16,0x082c:u8,0x0850:u8,0x0852:u8,0x0853:u8,0x0855:u8,0x0856:u8,0x0857:u8,0x0858:u8,0x085a:u16,0x085e:u16,0x0868:u16,0x0870:u8,0x0878:u8,0x17c0:u16,0x17c2:u8,0x17c3:u8,0x17c4:u16,0x17c6:u8,0x17c7:u8,0x1820:u16,0x1824:u16,0x1828:u16,0x182c:u16,0x1838:u16,0x183c:u16,0x1840:u16,0x1844:u16,0x1ba4:u32,0x1be0:u8,0x1c34:u32,0x1d00:u8,0x2fe4:u32,0x2fe8:u32,0x34dd:u8,0x34df:u8,0x34f3:u8,0x34f4:u8,0x34f5:u8,0x34f6:u8,0x34f7:u8,0x34f8:u8,0x34f9:u8,0x34fa:u8,0x34fb:u8,0x34fc:u8,0x34fd:u8,0x3540:u8,0x3544:u8,0x355c:u8,0x3568:u32,0x356c:u32,0x3588:u32,0x358c:u32,0x3598:u8,0x359c:u16,0x35a0:u8,0x35a4:u32,0x35a8:u16,0x35b8:u8,0x35b9:u8,0x35ba:u8,0x35bb:u8,0x35bc:u8,0x35bd:u8,0x35be:u8,0x35bf:u8,0x35c0:u8,0x35c1:u8,0x35c2:u8,0x35c3:u8,0x35c4:u8,0x35c5:u8,0x35c6:u8,0x35c7:u8,0x35c8:u8,0x35c9:u8,0x35ca:u8,0x35cb:u8,0x35cc:u8,0x35cd:u8,0x35ce:u8,0x35cf:u8,0x35d0:u8,0x35d1:u8,0x35d2:u8,0x35d3:u8,0x35d4:u8,0x35d5:u8,0x35d6:u8,0x35d7:u8,0x35d8:u8,0x35d9:u8,0x35da:u8,0x35db:u8,0x35dc:u8,0x3604:u8,0x360c:u8,0x360d:u8,0x3668:u8,0x366c:u8,0x366d:u8,0x3670:u8,0x6834:u8,0x683c:u8,0x6844:u8,0x684c:u8,0x6859:u8,0x68b0:u8,0x692b:u8,0x6990:u8,0x69e0:u8,0x69e1:u8,0x69e3:u8,0x69e4:u8,0x7e8c:u8
